title: Malty British Eggplant Fish And Chips
description: A romantic British dish that marries malted batter, crispy chips and sage‑herbed eggplant, served in a rustic clay pot.

ingredients.name: plant‑based fish fillets
ingredients.notes: soy fish or tofu fillets seasoned with sea salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Slice potatoes into 1/2-inch sticks, season with sea salt and black pepper, and spread them on the sheet.
Roast potatoes for 20 minutes, turning halfway, until golden and crisp.
While potatoes roast, slice eggplant into 3/4-inch rounds, brush both sides with olive oil, and sprinkle thyme and rosemary.
Whisk together malted barley flour, all‑purpose flour, baking powder, sea salt, and cold sparkling water until smooth to create the batter.
Dip eggplant slices into the batter, letting excess drip off, and arrange them on a separate baking sheet.
Bake eggplant in the oven at 200°C for 15 minutes, until the batter is golden and the eggplant is tender.
Once chips and eggplant are ready, preheat a clay pot over medium‑high heat and add a tablespoon of oil.
Add plant‑based fish fillets to the pot, cooking each side for 3 minutes until browned and heated through.
Plate chips, eggplant, and fish together; serve with malt vinegar and lemon wedges.
